SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CORRECTION PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-27-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ALDESON, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT LIONEL WEST IS NOT PRESENT. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN ALLOWS THE PLAINTIFF TO CORRECT THE ERROR AND RE-FILE THE PREVIOUS PROOF OF SERVICE AFTER THE HEARING DATE. NO FUTHER SERVICE IS NEEDED AT THIS TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
